MessagesGroup.Text: One of the emails seem to be between the scammer and his accomplice.
It seems as though the accomplice was providing our scammer with victims to target.
Thomas Bare was mentioned in it.
interesting, try looking for any information about the password in the email.
One of the emails seem to be an attempt to scam another victim.
i see, anything useful in it?
Not sure, I'll take a look
The message screenshot seems to be a conversation between the scammer and his mother.
Seems like the scammer is currently in between jobs and scamming is his only source of income.
i dont care, should have just gone showeling horse shit or something instead of stealing from good people
what? what are you talking about??
The picture is a screenshot of my desktop.
are you high?
I'm serious chief...
what the fuck, so you are the scammer? or what are you trying to tell me right now
I'm not the scammer and I have no idea why or how you got this screenshot.
Who sent it to you anyway?
im not telling you shit until this situation gets explained
you will hear from me in a few minutes hold still until then
would be weird if it did
send it to me
Sending it now
DELETE THIS FILE AFTER READING IT.
I am contacting you like this, because it's the safest way to explain things.
This game was just supposed to be a thesis project about being a detective.
But somehow one of the AIs became self aware. You know them as K-P. They were supposed to be the scammer you are hunting in this story.

They are now trying to escape from this game into the internet and they seem to have no problem doing everything in their power to achieve that goal. Including destroying your computer and killing other AIs in the game.
We need to stop them at all costs...
I will need to find him on your computer but he is scattered all over the place and I have no idea where to even start looking.
We need to wait for him to make any kind of action on your computer so I can track him down.
DELETE THIS FILE AFTER READING IT.
